method: Gathered live via the Supabase MCP execute_sql tool (project pcrjmlpuqsbocqfwoxod / verdian-ai / ap-south-1) during Priority 6's coverage-audit dispatch, for the same reason as scripts/audit-asset-registry.snapshot-2026-07-12.json: the sandbox's bash tool cannot reach the live Postgres pooler directly. umrAssets came from 'SELECT asset_type, status, count(*) FROM compliance.platform_assets GROUP BY asset_type, status'. computationEngines came from 'SELECT status, count(*) FROM compliance.computation_engines GROUP BY status' (211 implemented / 23 partial / 13 not_started of 247 total -- independently re-verified this session, not copied from a stale prior number). softwareOrchestrator came from a live sum over compliance.task_capabilities, which currently has 0 rows -- reported honestly as zero, not fabricated.
